revision.text:
[[ja:天津賀佐彦神社]] {{Expand Japanese|天津賀佐彦神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067) | native_name = 天津賀佐彦神社 | image = 阿波国式内社論社天都賀佐彦神社(美馬町西荒川).jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067) | coordinates = {{coord|34.055083333333336|134.03583333333333}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Amatsukasahiko Shrine'''|天津賀佐彦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183187 * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183187 ** Series ordinal: 2646 == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514}} ** Series ordinal: 13 ** P155: {{ill|Ameyoritateno Shrine|lt=Ameyoritateno Shrine|qid=Q135041311}} ** P156: {{ill|Yasokono Shrine|lt=Yasokono Shrine|qid=Q135041314}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Mima, Tokushima|lt=Mima|ar|ميما (توكوشيما)|azb|میما، توکوشیما|ca|Mima (ciutat)|ceb|Mima Shi|ce|Мима (гӀала)|de|Mima|en|Mima, Tokushima|envoyage|Mima|es|Mima (Tokushima)|fa|میما، توکوشیما|fi|Mima|fr|Mima|frvoyage|Mima|gl|Mima|hy|Միմա (քաղաք)|id|Mima, Tokushima|it|Mima|ja|美馬市|ko|미마시|mzn|میما، توکوشیما|nl|Mima|pl|Mima|pt|Mima|ro|Mima|ru|Мима (город)|sv|Mima, Tokushima|tg|Мима|tl|Mima, Tokushima|tr|Mima|tt|Мима (шәһәр)|uk|Міма (Токусіма)|vi|Mima, Tokushima|war|Mima, Tokushima|zh-classical|美馬市|zh_min_nan|Mima-chhī|zh_yue|美馬|zh|美馬市|qid=Q857828}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457}} * {{ill|Mima District, Tokushima|lt=Mima district|ceb|Mima Gun|en|Mima District, Tokushima|es|Distrito de Mima|fr|District de Mima|id|Distrik Mima, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Mima|ja|美馬郡|ko|미마군|pl|Powiat Mima|uk|Повіт Міма|zh|美馬郡|qid=Q1156496}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.055083333333336|134.03583333333333}} == image (P18) == * 阿波国式内社論社天都賀佐彦神社(美馬町西荒川).jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183187 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}} == different from (P1889) == * {{ill|Amatsukasahiko Shrine|lt=Amatsukasahiko Shrine|ja|天都賀佐比古神社|qid=Q107410066}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Amatsukasahikono Shrine|lt=Amatsukasahikono Shrine|qid=Q135041313}} ==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[JA:天津賀佐彦神社]] {{wikidata link|Q107410067}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]{{translated page|ja|天津賀佐彦神社|version=107356178|comment=Imported full ja history}} == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{混同|天都賀佐比古神社}} {{神社 |名称= 天津賀佐彦神社 |画像= [[File:阿波国式内社論社天都賀佐彦神社(美馬町西荒川).jpg|250px]] |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|美馬市|Q857828}}{{jalink|美馬町|Q11609479}}西荒川48-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|級長戸辺命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月19日|Q2961}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=天津賀佐彦
神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''天津賀佐彦神社'''（あまつかさひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|美馬市|Q857828}}{{jalink|美馬町|Q11609479}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『{{jalink|阿波志|Q65291985}}』には「天津賀比古祠　延喜式、亦小祀と爲す重清村荒川里に在り或は西岡宮と稱す」とある{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.buccyake-kojiki.com/archives/1070231126.html|title=天津賀佐彦神社|publisher=神社と古事記|accessdate=2021-05-21}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である天都賀佐毘古神社の論社のひとつである。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|級長戸辺命}} == 交通 == * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|小島駅|Q7106623}}」より車で約10分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
